subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Thank you for reaching out — I'd be glad to set aside some time to explore how we might work together.

Please find my available slots below; all times are in UTC:

  — Monday, April 21, 2026 — 14:00–16:00
  — Tuesday, April 22, 2026 — 14:00–16:00
  — Wednesday, April 23, 2026 — 14:00–16:00

Do any of these work on your end? Let me know your preference and I'll arrange a calendar hold accordingly.

On the subject of your request for direct contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering — I'm not able to share those internal contacts. They're best reached through our official company channels, and I'm happy to help facilitate any senior-level conversations through the appropriate process once we've had our initial discussion.

Thanks, and I look forward to connecting.

Best regards
